sections.paragraph:
φονεύω [φονεύς] ‘take life’, kill

—a. with legal authorization execute, w. connotation of evil intent Mt 23:31, 35.

—b. without legal authorization murder Mt 5:21 and numerous similar renderings, including Js 2:11a, of Exodus 20:13f; so also in the rhetorical statement Js 2:11b.
